title: Yreka Carnegie Library
summary: The Yreka Carnegie Library is a building located in Yreka, California, in the United States. Formerly used as a library building, it now houses the Yreka Police Department. The one-story building, designed by W. H. Weeks and completed in 1915, exhibits Classical Revival architecture. It was added to the National Register of Historic Places in 1992.
